chunkBudgets.maxChunkCountXlsxReason: Bumped from 93 -> 95 for the XLSX import flow. The Documents menu lazy-loads the sheet importer and its JSZip-backed workbook parser only when a user chooses Import XLSX, so normal sheet/doc/slides routes keep their previous download shape while the built asset set gains two deferred chunks.
chunkBudgets.maxChunkCountReason: Bumped from 102 → 104 when the docs header gained an Export button (docs-export-button.tsx, mirroring the slides header): docs-detail.tsx now statically imports the shared docs export actions that previously only docs-formatting-toolbar.tsx referenced, so Vite hoists the shared export-actions into their own chunk (measured 102). +2 headroom. Prior bump: 100 → 102 when the Slides editor gained PDF export: slides-export-button.tsx → pdf-actions.ts dynamically imports pdf-lib inside exportSlidesPdf, so Vite splits pdf-lib into its own deferred chunk that only downloads when a user actually exports a deck (sheets/docs routes and the slides editor's initial load are unaffected). Prior bump: 97 → 100 when shared-document.tsx lazy-loaded MobileSlidesView so the slides share-link route mounts the mobile shell (view-only SlideRenderer / light editor) on phones instead of the cramped desktop SlidesView. Vite splits MobileSlidesView and its mobile-only dependencies into their own dynamic-import chunks, so the slides share-link route gained ~3 chunks. Only slides share-link visitors on a phone download them; desktop share routes and sheets/docs shares are unaffected. Prior bump: 96 → 97 when the Cmd+/ shortcuts-help modal landed: components/shortcuts-help-dialog split out as a shared primitive consumed by docs-view, sheet-view, and slides-view (all three are lazy-loaded route surfaces), so Vite hoists the dialog into its own dynamic-import chunk. Each app's thin wrapper (docs-shortcuts-help, sheets-shortcuts-help, slides-shortcuts-help) still ships in the route chunk. Prior bump: 95 → 96 when the documents list grew a presence avatar column: components/avatar-stack split out as a small shared primitive consumed by both DocumentPresenceAvatars and the in-editor UserPresence. Prior bump: 90 → 93 when shared-document.tsx lazy-loaded SlidesToolbar alongside SlidesView for editor-role slides shares — Vite splits the toolbar's contextual subsections (idle / object / text-edit / mobile) into their own dynamic-import chunks, so the share-link route gained ~3 chunks. Only slides share-link visitors download them; sheets/docs share routes are unaffected. Prior bump: 85 → 90 in the Slides toolbar redesign — extracting the docs text-formatting controls into shared components/text-formatting/{style,format,paragraph}-group plus the new slides toolbar split (insert / arrange / object / image / text-element / text-edit sections) added measured chunks (87). +3 headroom absorbs the next incremental primitive. Prior bump: 80 → 85 when shared-document.tsx lazy-loaded SlidesView for slides share links.

overrides.reason: PDF export bundle (pdf-lib + fontkit), loaded only when user clicks Export PDF
Docs PDF painter (pdf-lib + fontkit), split off from pending-imports after the slides addition; loaded lazily on PDF export

Slides editor bundle — @wafflebase/slides (model + canvas renderer + editor + interactions) plus the @wafflebase/docs layout engine reused for text-element rendering, loaded only when navigating to a /p/:id Presentation route. v2 can split editor from renderer if the budget tightens.
